steps.title: Identify the core requirement
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize a similarity in how the two cities celebrate. Looking at the notes, both Bangkok and Chiang Mai have thousands gathering for water fights—that's the parallel to highlight.

steps.title: Match the goal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice C uses “In both Bangkok and Chiang Mai” to highlight exactly this parallel: thousands gathering to celebrate Songkran with water fights.

The other choices either provide only general background (A), use “whereas” to emphasize a difference in venues (B), or explicitly contradict the goal by stating the celebrations aren't “exactly the same way” (D).

That matches choice C — C is correct.
